mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals strengthening household spending, raises near-term revenue expectations for index constituents, and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS 3-month momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.25%, the discount-rate channel dominates short-horizon equity pricing, reducing the required return on equities and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS observations generate lower mean 20-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of UNRATE above 7.5% signals severe labor-market slack, weaker household income growth, and rising recession-risk premia, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-above-7.5% triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS remains below 1% signals policy falling behind inflation, increasing future tightening risk and equity duration risk, which predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized change crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS remains below 1%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger has nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 forward returns after transaction-free walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Positive monthly momentum in INDPRO signals improving production volumes and operating leverage for cyclical firms, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO monthly increases do not produce a positive 5-day return hit rate above 52% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST crosses above 900 thousand units, residential construction momentum signals stronger durable demand and credit creation, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-above-900 triggers produce lower average 60-day S&P 500 returns than periods with HOUST below 900.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS rising while UNRATE falls identifies broad labor-market healing, supporting household income and risk appetite, and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change crosses above 0 while UNRATE 3-month change is below 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down signal has a 20-day forward return hit rate at or below 50% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: INDPRO contraction combined with accelerating CPIAUCSL signals stagflationary supply stress, compressing margins and equity multiples, and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change crosses below 0 while CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change crosses above 3%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO-contraction and CPIAUCSL-acceleration periods have nonnegative median 60-day S&P 500 forward returns.
